Release Notes/2025.30000

Current Official Build 2025.32460 Download - Mar 10 2026

Known Issues

  • HDR backdrop blending issue.

Build 2025.32460 Mar 10, 2026

Hotfix for 2025.32440 ray tracing bug.

New Features

  • Text POP - A new POP with text as 3D line strips.
  • Trace POP - A new POP for tracing 2D inputs.

Bug Fixes and Improvements

  • Trail POP - Fixed double-transforming when cooking a second time.
  • Movie File In TOP - Fixed incorrect ProRes 4:4:4:4 output.

Backward Compatibility Changes

  • Some backward compat note.

Build 2025.32280 Jan 20, 2025

New Features

  • Some feature in earlier build.

Bug Fixes and Improvements

  • Count CHOP - Fixed count down pulse issue.
